howItWorks.intro: This ai agent cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Cost per Task = Steps × Tokens per Step × Average Token Rate
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How much do AI agents cost to run?
faq.answer: A single agent task using Sonnet with 15 steps at 5K tokens/step costs roughly $0.67. At 50 tasks/day, that is about $33/day or $1,000/month.

faq.question: How to reduce AI agent costs?
faq.answer: Use Haiku for simple subtasks, cache repeated context, limit maximum steps, and use smaller models for routing and classification tasks.

howWeCalculate.intro: This ai agent cost calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above

Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
howWeCalculate.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on standard formulas. For critical decisions, always consult a qualified professional.
